title: Deterministic build harness (extractâ†’tidyâ†’reconcileâ†’checksum)
context: Trust in this project's derivative datasets rests on deterministic, reproducible builds: any third party must be able to re-derive every dataset from the licensed FAOSTAT source and confirm it matches the committed output. The build harness implements the extract-tidy-reconcile-checksum pipeline per the dataset spec (dataspec-005), runs in CI, and ships golden fixtures so 'CI green' means reproducibility is verified, not just linting.
objective: Implement the deterministic build harness (TypeScript, ESM, pnpm) that extracts from FAOSTAT, tidy-transforms, decodes status flags, reconciles against source totals, and emits Frictionless + Croissant metadata with a committed output checksum.
acceptanceCriteria: Implements the extractâ†’tidyâ†’reconcileâ†’validateâ†’checksum pipeline as a TypeScript/ESM Node package per the canonical model in dataspec-005.

Decodes FAOSTAT status flags (official/estimated/imputed/aggregate), normalizes units, attaches ISO3 and M49 codes, preserves reference periods and published uncertainty (e.g. PoU lower/upper bounds) â€” drops nothing silently.
Emits a tidy long-format CSV, a Frictionless Tabular Data Package (datapackage.json), and Croissant ML JSON-LD metadata.
Reconciles against FAOSTAT source totals/aggregates within a documented tolerance; emits a QA report.
Ships committed golden-fixture tests: a known extract with expected output checksum and source-total reconciliation; CI re-derives and asserts equality (proves reproducibility).
Unit tests assert status flags and published uncertainty survive the transform intact.
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; code is MIT-licensed; no credentials or API keys committed; commit is DCO signed-off.
resources: PLAN.md â€” Locked decisions (deterministic, checksum-verified reproducibility)
output: A merged PR adding the deterministic build harness package with CI-green golden-fixture tests and checksum reconciliation.
